name: Czech Republic
avoid: Prague tourist traps — explore beyond the centre

cities.name: Prague
cities.notes: Charles Bridge at dawn, Prague Castle, Astronomical Clock and craft beer

cities.name: Cesky Krumlov
cities.notes: Perfectly preserved medieval town on a Vltava river bend

cities.name: Brno
